description: Every TickTick surface — tasks, habits, focus, daily notes — with a corruption-proof daily-note contract and offline analytics no other TickTick tool has.

required_headers.name: User-Agent
required_headers.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

tools.name: completed_list
tools.description: Completed tasks in a date window. Optional: from, to, limit (default: 100). Returns array of Task.

tools.name: focus_timeline
tools.description: Focus and pomodoro records, most recent first. Optional: to. Returns array of FocusRecord.

params.name: to
params.description: Only records before this timestamp (epoch millis; empty = latest)

tools.name: habits_checkin
tools.description: Upsert habit checkins (batch add/update). Optional: add, update. Returns the new BatchResult.

params.name: add
params.description: Checkin objects to create (JSON array: {habitId, checkinStamp, status, value})

params.name: update
params.description: Checkin objects to update (JSON array; carry id + habitId)

tools.name: habits_checkins
tools.description: Query habit checkins after a date stamp. Required: habitIds, afterStamp. Returns the new CheckinMap.

params.name: habitIds
params.description: Habit ids to query (JSON array of strings)

params.name: afterStamp
params.description: Date stamp lower bound, YYYYMMDD as integer (e.g. 20260630)

tools.name: habits_list
tools.description: List all habits. Returns array of Habit.

tools.name: projects_list
tools.description: List all projects. Returns array of Project.

tools.name: tags_list
tools.description: List all tags. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: tasks_batch
tools.description: Batch create/update/delete tasks (arrays of task objects; updates must carry id, projectId, etag and must NOT include kind). Optional: add, update, delete. Returns the new BatchResult.

params.name: update
params.description: Task objects to update (JSON array; carry id/projectId/etag, never kind)

params.name: delete
params.description: Task refs to delete (JSON array of {taskId, projectId})

tools.name: tasks_get
tools.description: Get a single task by id (full JSON incl. kind, etag, childIds). Required: taskId, projectId. Returns the Task.

params.name: projectId
params.description: Project id the task belongs to

tools.name: tasks_list
tools.description: List all uncompleted tasks (from the V2 sync check). Returns array of Task.

tools.name: user_profile
tools.description: Authenticated user profile. Returns the UserProfile.
